biography: Riku, brother of the esteemed Panu, is a name that resonates with quiet intensity within golfing circles. Known for his methodical approach and unwavering focus, Riku has graced the Hector Trophée on one occasion.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy have remained just beyond his grasp, Riku's presence on the course is always marked by a palpable sense of determination. Although considered retired from the Hector Trophée, the possibility of a future return remains a topic of speculation among enthusiasts.
